title: Created by Monday automation in creation Log when submitting WorkForm
excerpt: So I think it would be really great, if in Creation log it would show that item was created by monday automation, when the WorkForm has been filled. We are using forms for clients request so they do not have access to ou…

posts.author: Martini (Martynas)
posts.cookedHtml: So I think it would be really great, if in Creation log it would show that item was created by monday automation, when the WorkForm has been filled. We are using forms for clients request so they do not have access to our Monday account, and so it just shows that I created all the items (since I created the form). But this information is just useless.

posts.author: akm (angelica kemper)
posts.cookedHtml: Fully agree. It would be great to have default options or some other trigger to differentiate the actual creator/requester versus just autotagging the Form/Board owners.
